states_columns.sql_string:
---- Columns states (1a94iln)
DESCRIBE SELECT * FROM (select distinct state
from voter_analytics.mrt_voter_counts
order by state
) AS "inputQuery-uv"

states_length.sql_string:
---- Length states (1a94iln)
SELECT COUNT(*) as rowCount FROM (SELECT * FROM (select distinct state
from voter_analytics.mrt_voter_counts
order by state
) AS "inputQuery-uv")

states_data.sql_string:
---- Data states 1a94iln
SELECT * FROM (select distinct state
from voter_analytics.mrt_voter_counts
order by state
) AS "inputQuery-uv"

voter_counts_columns.sql_string:
---- Columns voter_counts (utrtgy)
DESCRIBE SELECT * FROM (select
    state,
    age_group,
    party,
    voter_count
from voter_analytics.mrt_voter_counts
where coalesce('', '') = '' or state = ''
order by state, age_group, party
) AS "inputQuery-qo"

voter_counts_length.sql_string:
---- Length voter_counts (utrtgy)
SELECT COUNT(*) as rowCount FROM (SELECT * FROM (select
    state,
    age_group,
    party,
    voter_count
from voter_analytics.mrt_voter_counts
where coalesce('', '') = '' or state = ''
order by state, age_group, party
) AS "inputQuery-qo")

voter_counts_data.sql_string:
---- Data voter_counts utrtgy
SELECT * FROM (select
    state,
    age_group,
    party,
    voter_count
from voter_analytics.mrt_voter_counts
where coalesce('', '') = '' or state = ''
order by state, age_group, party
) AS "inputQuery-qo"

state_totals_columns.sql_string:
---- Columns state_totals (167w44r)
DESCRIBE SELECT * FROM (select
    state,
    party,
    sum(voter_count) as total_voters
from voter_analytics.mrt_voter_counts
where coalesce('', '') = '' or state = ''
group by state, party
order by state, party
) AS "inputQuery-4i"

state_totals_length.sql_string:
---- Length state_totals (167w44r)
SELECT COUNT(*) as rowCount FROM (SELECT * FROM (select
    state,
    party,
    sum(voter_count) as total_voters
from voter_analytics.mrt_voter_counts
where coalesce('', '') = '' or state = ''
group by state, party
order by state, party
) AS "inputQuery-4i")

party_totals_columns.sql_string:
---- Columns party_totals (2vuo2t)
DESCRIBE SELECT * FROM (select
    party,
    sum(voter_count) as total_voters
from voter_analytics.mrt_voter_counts
where coalesce('', '') = '' or state = ''
group by party
order by total_voters desc
) AS "inputQuery-Ry"
